title: Create: Rocked and Decadent
description: An addon for Create that adds a bunch of recipes that allow you to make certain blocks and items more renewable than they are normally.
body:
This is an addon for Create that adds a bunch of recipes that allow you to make certain blocks and items more renewable than they are normally.


<details>
<summary>Recipes it adds</summary>
  
**Minecraft:**
- Calcite
- Coarse Dirt
- Dirt
- Deepslate
- Cobbled Deepslate
- Cobblestone
- Dripstone
- Pointed Dripstone
- End stone
- Netherrack
- Diorite

**Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks:**
- Arcane Essence
- Cinder Essence
- Blank Rune

**My Nether's Delight:**
- Blaze Powder

</details>

Has optional support for:
 - Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
 - My Nether's Delight
